video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 19 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: it was a strange start to stage 19 of this 2020 children italia riders crossing through the neutralized zone but at kilometer zero getting off their bikes into cars and buses and being taken further up the road where the race would resume 124 kilometers from the finish the reason given a ride of protest over the length of stage length of days and conditions at the race chaos ensued for buses dry gear and in the end things would get moving although on four wheels rather than two it was supposed to be the longest stage of the geode italia at 260 kilometers perhaps excessively so but the riders leaving it very late to put their opinion across and in the end chaos before the stage when we did get going peter sagan and company all ready to go with 124 kilometers wilko kelderman the new man in the maya rosa stefan olakio would wave the flag and there would be attacks from the gun a flat stage towards asti not starting from mourveno as it had meant to do but from abiate grasso 14 riders got up the road cheney would attack from that group alongside couple nights and there'd be a thinning out behind barahanskur trying to ride for a sprint for petr segan his last opportunity realistically to take the maya chiclamino from arnold de mar but with just over 50 kilometers to go they called off the search and it became clear that the breakaway was going to win nobody else interested in the stage victory behind that was leave it to everybody else to fight it out at the front 25 kilometers to go and cherny forcing the issue and he continued to do so with 22 and a half kilometers left on the clock he'd leave clark mosca campenarts and this man elio kessa behind he'd get a maximum gap of around 41 seconds and with six kilometers to go is still unsure as to whether he was going to win the light fading the gloom descending on the judo inside the final kilometer a 20-second gap kappanacht set off in search one last ditch attack but it would be the first ever grand tour stage win in the end for the 27 year old from the czech republic the first victory for ccc at this level for two seasons as well a huge moment for journey and perhaps offering him a lifeline to stay in the sport next season cheney ahead of carpoon arts 18 seconds the margin of victory with room for a celebration jacob mosca taking third place behind in the peloton there'll be a late attempt for tailgate to try and snatch a second or two away from jaya hindley and wilco kelderman just 15 seconds separating the podium going into the final three stages that proved to be unsuccessful everybody finishing together and the gc battle would be fought out on the final two days kellerman leading the jitter italia by 12 seconds and looking to become the fifth dutch grand tour winner ahead of his teammate jai henley tailgate and heart at 15 bill powell at 119 the candidates still the victory another change of stage route but this one had been announced three climbs of cestrelle over 190 kilometers will be the final road and final mountain stage of this 2020 chiro d'italia time trial remaining two in milan it's all to play for 15 seconds between the top three who's your money on it'll be a very very good watch you
